task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into LibreHealth EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (likely showing 'admin' as the logged-in user).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the chart for patient 'Allan Thomas'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient header or active patient context displays the name 'Allan Thomas' and/or PID '782'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the section to add a medical problem/issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or dialog for adding a new medical problem, issue, or diagnosis is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct problem title and ICD code are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' is entered in the problem/title field, and 'E11' is entered in the ICD/coding field.

task_completion.description: Verify the problem status is set to 'Active'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, radio button, or selection field for the medical problem is explicitly set to 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify the medical problem was saved and appears in the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical problem 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' (with code E11 and Active status) is visible in the saved list of the patient's active problems or issues.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the LibreHealth EHR interface, not a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by using direct database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show form filling and clicking 'Save' in the UI, rather than terminal windows executing SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the final result appears to be a genuine part of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added medical problem should match the styling, font, and layout of the LibreHealth EHR issues list, without signs of manual HTML manipulation.
